content.text: API error handling defines how REST clients interpret failed responses — status codes, structured error bodies, retry eligibility, and user-visible messages. Agent loops depend on consistent error contracts to retry transient LLM failures, surface tool errors to the model, and fail fast on misconfiguration.
REST APIs signal errors with HTTP
). Clients map these to exceptions, retry policies, and agent-visible tool messages.
Without structured handling, agents treat all failures alike — retrying
. Tool functions must convert HTTP errors into JSON the model can reason about while logging technical detail server-side.
— retry transient, fix auth, skip bad input
— concise tool error strings for replanning
— error codes in metrics and alerts
— raw stack traces to model leak internals
sanitized messages to model; log full body internally
Agent orchestrator classifies LLM API errors: rate limit → sleep and retry same turn; invalid model → fatal config alert; context length exceeded → truncate and retry with summarization strategy.
Passing raw HTML error pages to model
No idempotency on retried POST tools
Centralize HTTP error mapping in client base class
Publish stable error codes on your agent API
Include correlation id in error responses and logs
Document retry policy per integration in runbooks

gRPC uses status codes + details protobuf. GraphQL often returns 200 with errors array. REST agents must inspect HTTP status even when body looks successful. Some APIs always return 200 with error field — treat as anti-pattern but handle explicitly if required.

Do not return internal stack traces or secrets in API error JSON. Rate-limit your own agent API error responses to prevent abuse. Circuit-break upstream tools that fail repeatedly to protect the agent loop.
: red (stop/repair input), yellow (wait and retry), green (success). Agents need a driver's manual mapping each provider's signals to actions.
Map status codes and error bodies to typed exceptions
Retry transient errors; fail fast on client errors
Return sanitized tool errors to the model; log details server-side
Design consistent error JSON for your own agent platform API
